headline: US strikes Iran 3rd night; Trump drops Hormuz toll, blames Iran
gist: 3rd night of US strikes on Iran; Trump dropped the proposed Hormuz shipping toll, says strait open to all except Iran; oil holds near highs.

headline: Nifty, Sensex gap up on Hormuz de-escalation, banks lead
gist: Nifty/Sensex gapped up on Hormuz de-escalation with ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, SBI, Bharti Airtel leading gains, before paring most of the move.

headline: Infosys, TCS among top Nifty50 laggards today
gist: IT majors Infosys and TCS underperformed the broader Nifty50 today.

headline: FIIs net sell Rs 740cr, DIIs net buy Rs 2,928cr on NSE
gist: Provisional NSE data: FII net selling ~Rs 740cr, DII net buying ~Rs 2,928cr, cushioning the Nifty dip.

headline: Gold, silver slip as Hormuz de-escalation cuts safe-haven bid
gist: Gold ~$4,026 (-1.1%), silver ~$58.36 (-1.3%) as safe-haven demand eased after Trump dropped the Hormuz toll threat.
